SEARCH
Package com.unimib.assignment3.repository

Interface TaskRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Task,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Task,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Task,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Task,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Task,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Task>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Task,Long>
public interface TaskRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Task,Long>
Repository interface for Task entities.

Provides standard CRUD operations and custom JPQL queries for task state,

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    countByTaskState(TaskState taskState)
    Counts the total number of tasks in a specific state.
    List<Task>
    findByTaskState(TaskState taskState)
    Retrieves a list of tasks that are in a specific state.
    List<Task>
    findTasksByEmployee(Employee employee)
    Retrieves all tasks assigned to a specific employee.
    List<Task>
    findTasksByStateAndEmployeesCount(TaskState taskState, int numEmployees)
    Retrieves tasks in a specific state with an exact number of assigned employees.
    List<Task>
    findTasksByStateWithEmployees(TaskState taskState)
    Retrieves tasks in a specific state that have at least one employee assigned.
    List<Task>
    findTasksByTeamId(Long teamId)
    Retrieves all tasks associated with a specific team.
    List<Task>
    findTasksWithMoreThanNEmployees(int minEmployees)
    Retrieves tasks that have more than a specific number of assigned employees.
    List<Task>
    findTasksWithoutEmployee()
    Retrieves all tasks that do not have any employees assigned.

    Methods inherited from interface org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository

    count, delete, deleteAll, deleteAll, deleteAllById, deleteById, existsById, findById, save

    Methods inherited from interface org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository

    deleteAllByIdInBatch, deleteAllInBatch, deleteAllInBatch, deleteInBatch, findAll, findAll, flush, getById, getOne, getReferenceById, saveAllAndFlush, saveAndFlush

    Methods inherited from interface org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository

    findAll, findAllById, saveAll

    Methods inherited from interface org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository

    findAll

    Methods inherited from interface org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository

    findAll

    Methods inherited from interface org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor

    count, exists, findAll, findBy, findOne

  • Method Details

    • findByTaskState

      List<Task> findByTaskState(TaskState taskState)
      Retrieves a list of tasks that are in a specific state.
      Parameters:
      taskState - the state to filter tasks by
      Returns:
      a list of tasks in the given state

    • countByTaskState

      long countByTaskState(TaskState taskState)
      Counts the total number of tasks in a specific state.
      Parameters:
      taskState - the state to count tasks for
      Returns:
      the total count of tasks in the given state

    • findTasksByEmployee

      @Query("SELECT t FROM task t JOIN t.assignedEmployees d WHERE d = :employee") List<Task> findTasksByEmployee(@Param("employee") Employee employee)
      Retrieves all tasks assigned to a specific employee.
      Parameters:
      employee - the employee entity to search for
      Returns:
      a list of tasks assigned to the employee

    • findTasksWithoutEmployee

      @Query("SELECT t FROM task t WHERE SIZE(t.assignedEmployees) = 0") List<Task> findTasksWithoutEmployee()
      Retrieves all tasks that do not have any employees assigned.
      Returns:
      a list of unassigned tasks

    • findTasksWithMoreThanNEmployees

      @Query("SELECT t FROM task t WHERE SIZE(t.assignedEmployees) > :minEmployees") List<Task> findTasksWithMoreThanNEmployees(@Param("minEmployees") int minEmployees)
      Retrieves tasks that have more than a specific number of assigned employees. Used to identify "complex" tasks.
      Parameters:
      minEmployees - the threshold of employees
      Returns:
      a list of tasks with more than minEmployees assigned

    • findTasksByStateWithEmployees

      @Query("SELECT t FROM task t WHERE t.taskState = :taskState AND SIZE(t.assignedEmployees) > 0") List<Task> findTasksByStateWithEmployees(@Param("taskState") TaskState taskState)
      Retrieves tasks in a specific state that have at least one employee assigned.
      Parameters:
      taskState - the state of the tasks
      Returns:
      a list of tasks in the given state with assignments

    • findTasksByStateAndEmployeesCount

      @Query("SELECT t FROM task t WHERE t.taskState = :taskState AND SIZE(t.assignedEmployees) = :numEmployees") List<Task> findTasksByStateAndEmployeesCount(@Param("taskState") TaskState taskState, @Param("numEmployees") int numEmployees)
      Retrieves tasks in a specific state with an exact number of assigned employees.
      Parameters:
      taskState - the state of the tasks
      numEmployees - the exact number of employees assigned
      Returns:
      a list of matching tasks

    • findTasksByTeamId

      @Query("SELECT t FROM team tm JOIN tm.tasks t WHERE tm.teamId = :teamId") List<Task> findTasksByTeamId(@Param("teamId") Long teamId)
      Retrieves all tasks associated with a specific team.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the ID of the team
      Returns:
      a list of tasks belonging to the team
